patch.value:
GitHub: https://github.com/unbraind/pm-cli/issues/445

## Problem
In a tag-heavy workspace ~43% of `pm context` brief output (1970 of 4582 B) is repeated `tags:` blocks — siblings inherit the parent tag set and repeat it verbatim per row. No --no-tags; brief depth cannot drop tags.

## Proposed fix
(1) `--no-tags` on context (and honor --fields projection, shipped via PR#297); (2) inherited-tag folding: when all low_level children share the parent tag set, emit tags once on the parent (or `tags_inherited: true`); (3) consider tag-less rows as the brief-depth default.

## Definition of done
Context size in this workspace cut ~40% at brief depth with no loss for the next-work decision; spec pins folding semantics; MCP pm_context parity; docs updated.
GH-445: suppress/factor repeated inherited tags in pm context rows (--no-tags + tag folding)

Dogfood GH-445: 43% of pm context brief output is repeated inherited tags blocks; add --no-tags and inherited-tag folding. Duplicate check: searched context tags/token — GH-435 item covers JSON nulls, this covers tag repetition; no other overlap.
context supports --no-tags; inherited tag sets folded to parent row (or tags_inherited marker); ~40% brief-depth size cut measured here; MCP parity; spec pins folding semantics
